englishDefinitions: a famous movie, novel, and media franchise about cloned dinosaurs in a theme park
persianTranslation: عنوان فیلم و مجموعه‌ای درباره دایناسورهای شبیه‌سازی‌شده
examples: Jurassic Park became a very popular film in the 1990s.
Many children love the dinosaurs in Jurassic Park.
He said the movie reminded him of Jurassic Park.
